commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The maintainer label, merge conflict, and service-binding API/security-boundary direction require human owner judgment before any automated repair path.; Needs attention: The diff introduces an exported module-global service override surface for guarded fetch, auth lookup, redaction, MIME detection, and session sanitization.; Review finding: [P1] Keep remote HTTP on a bound guarded fetch — packages/memory-hos... (sha=1b7b9b9547f8b5fc788b6876cb42889ba253d37a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces the memory-host SDK's private core runtime bridge with package-local services and core/plugin SDK facades, and converts the thread-memory QA scenario to YAML.

PR surface: Source +753, Tests +94, Docs -108, Other +111. Total +850 across 39 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the PR-head helper no longer forwards `AbortSignal`, the plugin SDK still exposes package helpers that can hit an unbound guarded-fetch service, and the default MIME service ignores byte sniffing that current main uses.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The `maintainer` label, merge conflict, and service-binding API/security-boundary direction require human owner judgment before any automated repair path.

target.title: refactor(memory-host): replace core runtime bridge with services
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: `packages/memory-host-sdk` still reached into core through private `openclaw-runtime*` bridge files.
- Why it matters: the package boundary was package-shaped but not actually core-independent.
- What changed: added package-local `MemoryHostServices`, moved OpenClaw-bound exports to `src/memory-host-sdk/*`, and removed the package `host/openclaw-runtime*` adapters.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): no user-facing memory behavior or config defaults changed; existing plugin SDK subpaths remain compatible.

## Change Type (select all)

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [x] Refactor required for the fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [ ] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [x] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [x] API / contracts
- [ ] UI / DX
- [ ] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Closes #
- Related #
- [ ] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Root Cause (if applicable)

- Root cause: N/A, refactor.
- Missing detection / guardrail: package boundary test allowed the private bridge as an exception.
- Contributing context (if known): memory-host code had grown around compatibility facades while bundled plugins still consumed core-bound helpers.

## Regression Test Plan (if applicable)

N/A.

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

None.

## Diagram (if applicable)

```text
Before:
packages/memory-host-sdk -> host/openclaw-runtime* -> src/** core internals

After:
packages/memory-host-sdk -> host/services contract
src/memory-host-sdk/* -> core-bound compatibility facades for plugin-sdk subpaths
```

## Security Impact (required)

- New permissions/capabilities? (`No`)
- Secrets/tokens handling changed? (`No`)
- New/changed network calls? (`No`)
- Command/tool execution surface changed? (`No`)
- Data access scope changed? (`No`)
- If any `Yes`, explain risk + mitigation: N/A

## Repro + Verification

### Environment

- OS: Blacksmith Testbox CI environment
- Runtime/container: repo CI Node/pnpm environment
- Model/provider: N/A
- Integration/channel (if any): memory host / plugin SDK
- Relevant config (redacted): N/A

### Steps

1. Run focused package and contract tests.
2. Run changed-file gate.
3. Run build gate.

### Expected

- Package boundary has zero core references.
- Plugin SDK compatibility subpaths still typecheck/import.
- Build and changed-file gate pass.

### Actual

- Passed.

## Evidence

- [x] Failing test/log before + passing after
- [ ] Trace/log snippets
- [ ] Screenshot/recording
- [ ] Perf numbers (if relevant)

## Human Verification (required)

- Verified scenarios:
  - `pnpm test packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/session-files.test.ts packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/remote-http.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/extension-package-project-boundaries.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-subpaths.test.ts`
  - `pnpm check:changed`
  - `pnpm build`
- Edge cases checked: package boundary test now requires no core references and no `openclaw-runtime` adapter imports.
- What you did **not** verify: live memory search against an external embedding provider.

## Review Conversations

- [x] I replied to or resolved every bot review conversation I addressed in this PR.
- [x] I left unresolved only the conversations that still need reviewer or maintainer judgment.

## Compatibility / Migration

- Backward compatible? (`Yes`)
- Config/env changes? (`No`)
- Migration needed? (`No`)
- If yes, exact upgrade steps: N/A

## Risks and Mitigations

- Risk: plugin SDK memory host facades could accidentally drop compatibility exports.
  - Mitigation: extension typecheck, plugin SDK subpath contract tests, and build export checks passed.
